text:
| **Daemon startup** | Socket bound, relay pool connected, warmup complete, spawn-on-mention coverage count, shutdown | [...]      - Added at top of `run()`:
     ```rust
     crate::logging::init_daemon_logging(&crate::daemon::log_path())?;
     ```
     - Replaced all `eprintln!` with tracing: socket bound → `tracing::info!`, relay connected → `tracing::info!`, warmup complete → `tracing::info!`, spawn-on-mention coverage → `tracing::info!`, initial resubscribe failure → `tracing::warn!`, shutdown → `tracing::info!`, protocol re-exec → `tracing::info!`, connection error → `tracing::debug!`, accept error → `tracing::error!`
